'''鈭歾h-ng-zh''' ('''kazhangazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yearn|yearn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yearn|yearn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhangazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhangazh|thizhangazh]] || [[word:jizhangazh|jizhangazh]] || [[word:shizhangazh|shizhangazh]] || [[word:kizhangazh|kizhangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhangazh|thuthuzhangazh]] || [[word:jujuzhangazh|jujuzhangazh]] || [[word:shushuzhangazh|shushuzhangazh]] || [[word:kukuzhangazh|kukuzhangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhangazh|thuzhangazh]] || [[word:juzhangazh|juzhangazh]] || [[word:shuzhangazh|shuzhangazh]] || [[word:kuzhangazh|kuzhangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhangazh|thuzhangazh]] || [[word:juzhangazh|juzhangazh]] || [[word:shuzhangazh|shuzhangazh]] || [[word:kuzhangazh|kuzhangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhangazh|thezhangazh]] || [[word:jezhangazh|jezhangazh]] || [[word:shezhangazh|shezhangazh]] || [[word:kezhangazh|kezhangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhangazh|thothozhangazh]] || [[word:jojozhangazh|jojozhangazh]] || [[word:shoshozhangazh|shoshozhangazh]] || [[word:kokozhangazh|kokozhangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhangazh|thozhangazh]] || [[word:jozhangazh|jozhangazh]] || [[word:shozhangazh|shozhangazh]] || [[word:kozhangazh|kozhangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhangazh|thozhangazh]] || [[word:jozhangazh|jozhangazh]] || [[word:shozhangazh|shozhangazh]] || [[word:kozhangazh|kozhangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zhangazh|th忙zhangazh]] || [[word:j忙zhangazh|j忙zhangazh]] || [[word:sh忙zhangazh|sh忙zhangazh]] || [[word:k忙zhangazh|k忙zhangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhangazh|thathazhangazh]] || [[word:jajazhangazh|jajazhangazh]] || [[word:shashazhangazh|shashazhangazh]] || [[word:kakazhangazh|kakazhangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhangazh|thazhangazh]] || [[word:jazhangazh|jazhangazh]] || [[word:shazhangazh|shazhangazh]] || [[word:kazhangazh|kazhangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhangazh|thazhangazh]] || [[word:jazhangazh|jazhangazh]] || [[word:shazhangazh|shazhangazh]] || [[word:kazhangazh|kazhangazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhangazh|shazhangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhangazh|goshazhangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhangazh|gokishazhangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhangazhn眉|shazhangazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkn眉|goshazhangazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhn眉|gokishazhangazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhangazhsh毛|shazhangazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnksh毛|goshazhangazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhsh毛|gokishazhangazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangazhro|shazhangazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkro|goshazhangazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhro|gokishazhangazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangazhmu|shazhangazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkmu|goshazhangazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhmu|gokishazhangazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhangazhsher|shazhangazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnksher|goshazhangazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhsher|gokishazhangazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhangazhng|shazhangazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkng|goshazhangazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhng|gokishazhangazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhangazhya|shazhangazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkya|goshazhangazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhya|gokishazhangazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhangazhyam|shazhangazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkyam|goshazhangazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhyam|gokishazhangazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhangazhn眉sh毛|shazhangazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkn眉sh毛|goshazhangazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhn眉sh毛|gokishazhangazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangazhn眉ro|shazhangazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkn眉ro|goshazhangazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhn眉ro|gokishazhangazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangazhn眉mu|shazhangazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkn眉mu|goshazhangazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhn眉mu|gokishazhangazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhangazhsh毛n眉|shazhangazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnksh毛n眉|goshazhangazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhsh毛n眉|gokishazhangazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangazhsh毛ro|shazhangazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnksh毛ro|goshazhangazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhsh毛ro|gokishazhangazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangazhsh毛mu|shazhangazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnksh毛mu|goshazhangazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhsh毛mu|gokishazhangazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhangazhron眉|shazhangazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkron眉|goshazhangazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhron眉|gokishazhangazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhangazhrosh毛|shazhangazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkrosh毛|goshazhangazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhrosh毛|gokishazhangazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhangazhromu|shazhangazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkromu|goshazhangazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhromu|gokishazhangazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhangazhmun眉|shazhangazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkmun眉|goshazhangazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhmun眉|gokishazhangazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhangazhmush毛|shazhangazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkmush毛|goshazhangazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhmush毛|gokishazhangazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhangazhmuro|shazhangazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhangazhnkmuro|goshazhangazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhangazhmuro|gokishazhangazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
